parameters-en.Drive: Controls the amount of gain applied to the signal, which influences the level of distortion.
parameters-en.Bass: Controls the low frequency EQ of the tonestack.
parameters-en.Mid: Controls the midrange frequency EQ of the tonestack.
parameters-en.Mid Freq: Sets the frequency boosted or cut by the Mid parameter.
parameters-en.Treble: Controls the high frequency EQ of the tonestack.
parameters-en.Master: Controls the Master Volume of the amplifier.
parameters-en.Input Pad: Boosts or cuts the input signal into the preamp by 10 dB.
parameters-en.Boost: When on, supplies an additional boost for noticeably more gain and distortion.
parameters-en.Limiter: When on, enables the built-in limiter.
parameters-en.Threshold: Sets the level above which limiting is applied. Lower values limit more of the signal; higher values limit only louder parts of the signal.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the overall level of the Amp block. Unlike Master Volume, it has no effect on the block's tone.
